businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de défauts dans les produits

inputs.label: Recall Effectiveness
inputs.businessContext: Effectiveness of the recall campaign (percentage of defective products reached)

businessContext_i18n.en: Effectiveness of the recall campaign (percentage of defective products reached)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geri çağırma kampanyasının etkinliği (ulaşılabilen kusurlu ürünlerin yüzdesi)
businessContext_i18n.de: Effektivität der Rückrufaktion (Prozentsatz der erreichbaren fehlerhaften Produkte)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Efficacité de la campagne de rappel (pourcentage de produits défectueux atteints)
businessContext_i18n.es: Efectividad de la campaña de retiro (porcentaje de productos defectuosos alcanzados)
businessContext_i18n.ar: فعالية حملة الاستدعاء (نسبة المنتجات المعيبة التي تم الوصول إليها)

inputs.label: Unit Recall Cost
inputs.businessContext: Recall processing cost per unit (logistics, communication)

businessContext_i18n.en: Recall processing cost per unit (logistics, communication)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birim başına geri çağırma işlem maliyeti (lojistik, iletişim)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût opérationnel de rappel par unité (logistique, communication)
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo operativo de retiro por unidad (logística, comunicación)
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكلفة عملية الاستدعاء لكل وحدة (اللوجستيات، الاتصالات)

businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût fixe de gestion et d'organisation
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo fijo de gestión y organización

inputs.label: Unit Replacement Cost
inputs.businessContext: Replacement or repair cost per unit

businessContext_i18n.en: Replacement or repair cost per unit
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birim başına değiştirme veya onarım maliyeti
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût de remplacement ou de réparation par unité
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo de reemplazo o reparación por unidad
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكلفة الاستبدال أو الإصلاح لكل وحدة

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
